auth.name: Full Name
auth.enterYourCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

about.title: About TestTool
about.description: TestTool is a project developed by a QA professional for QA and Development teams.
about.purpose: The goal is to provide a free, open-source alternative to commercial test management tools.
about.features: Features include test case management, test plan execution tracking, bug management, CI/CD integration, and comprehensive reports.

testPlans.title: Test Plans
testPlans.selectProject: Select a project to view test plans
testPlans.selectProjectDescription: Please select a project from the header to view and manage test plans.
testPlans.noPlansDescription: Create your first test plan to start organizing and managing your test cases effectively.

create.title: Create Test Plan
create.description: A test plan documents the approach, scope, schedule, and resources for your testing activities.

edit.title: Edit Test Plan
edit.description: Update the test plan details, scope, and schedule.

fields.name: Test Plan Name
fields.nameHelp: A concise name that identifies the product, release, or testing scope.
fields.objectivesPlaceholder:
Describe the objectives, scope, and what is in and out of scope for this plan.

Example:
- Goal: validate checkout flow with multiple payment methods
- In scope: functional tests, regression, exploratory
- Out of scope: load testing, mobile browsers
fields.objectivesHelp: Communicate the test approach to team members. Include objectives, what is in scope, what is out of scope, and any assumptions.
fields.scheduleHelp: Set the planned start and end dates for testing activities.
fields.startDateHelp: Planned date when testing activities begin.

toasts.deleteFailed: Failed to delete test plan. Please try again.

settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email updates on test completion
settings.weeklySummaryDesc: Receive a weekly summary of test results
settings.dataRetentionDesc: How long to keep execution history and logs
